audit_metadata.audit_scope: Frontend codebase, authentication patterns, dependency analysis

issues.title: Insecure token storage in localStorage
issues.description: Documentation suggests httpOnly cookies but implementation uses localStorage for token storage, making tokens vulnerable to XSS attacks.
issues.impact: Authentication tokens can be stolen via XSS attacks
issues.fix: Implement httpOnly cookies with SameSite=Strict for token storage
references: OWASP A07:2021 - Identification and Authentication Failures

issues.title: Missing authentication implementation
issues.description: AuthContext lacks proper JWT token handling, refresh logic, and secure logout implementation.
issues.impact: Incomplete authentication system vulnerable to session hijacking
issues.fix: Implement complete JWT authentication flow with refresh tokens and proper session management
references: OWASP A07:2021 - Identification and Authentication Failures

issues.title: No Content Security Policy headers
issues.description: Missing CSP headers allowing potential XSS attacks and inline script execution.
issues.impact: Application vulnerable to XSS attacks and malicious script injection
issues.fix: Configure strict CSP headers blocking inline scripts and restricting resource origins

issues.title: Unsafe dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage
issues.description: Multiple uses of dangerouslySetInnerHTML for JSON-LD injection without proper sanitization.
issues.impact: Potential XSS if JSON-LD data is not properly sanitized
issues.fix: Replace with safe JSON-LD rendering or implement proper sanitization

issues.title: Console logging in production
issues.description: Console.log statements present in production code that may expose sensitive information.
issues.fix: Remove console statements or gate them with NODE_ENV checks
references: OWASP A09:2021 - Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

issues.title: Missing HTTPS enforcement
issues.description: No HTTPS redirect or HSTS headers configured.
issues.impact: Data transmitted in plain text vulnerable to interception
issues.fix: Configure HTTPS redirect and HSTS headers in production

issues.title: Dependency vulnerabilities
issues.description: Vite 6.0.0-6.3.5 has known vulnerabilities in middleware file serving.
issues.impact: Known security vulnerabilities in build tool

issues.title: PII exposure in DevTools
issues.description: DevTools component logs localStorage contents which may contain PII.
issues.impact: Sensitive user data exposed in console logs
issues.fix: Remove or sanitize localStorage logging to exclude PII

issues.title: No rate limiting configuration
issues.description: Missing rate limiting on authentication and sensitive endpoints.
issues.impact: Potential for brute force attacks and API abuse
issues.fix: Implement rate limiting on auth endpoints and sensitive operations
references: OWASP A07:2021 - Identification and Authentication Failures

issues.title: Missing input validation patterns
issues.description: Lack of comprehensive client-side input validation and sanitization.
issues.impact: Potential for injection attacks through user inputs
issues.fix: Add comprehensive client-side validation with sanitization

issues.title: Weak logout implementation
issues.description: Logout only clears localStorage without invalidating server sessions.
issues.impact: Session may remain active on server after logout
issues.fix: Call server logout endpoint, clear all storage, invalidate tokens
references: OWASP A07:2021 - Identification and Authentication Failures

issues.title: No GDPR compliance implementation
issues.description: Missing data export, deletion, and consent management features required for GDPR/CCPA compliance.
issues.impact: Legal compliance violations and potential fines
issues.fix: Implement data export, deletion, and consent management flows

immediate: Implement secure token storage using httpOnly cookies
Complete authentication implementation with proper JWT handling
Update Vite dependency to address known vulnerabilities
medium_term: Remove or secure console logging statements
Implement HTTPS enforcement and security headers
long_term: Add rate limiting and API security measures
Set up security monitoring and alerting
